description: A thousand-year-old ancient town by the Li River, featured as the background of the 20 RMB banknote, rustic and tranquil with picturesque landscapes.
Located within Jingjiang Princes' City, the highest point in Guilin City, offering a panoramic view of the entire city from the summit.
Bamboo raft tour along the essence section of the Li River, passing by scenic spots such as Nine Horse Fresco Hill and Yellow Cloth Reflection, featured on the 20 RMB banknote.
A historical and cultural district in Guilin, a pedestrian street integrating traditional architecture, specialty snacks, and cultural and creative shops.
A quintessential drifting experience in Yangshuo, riding bamboo rafts through idyllic landscapes, enjoying the serene and distant charm of the scenery.
A large-scale live-action performance directed by Zhang Yimou, a stunning audiovisual feast using the Li River as its stage.
A classic cycling route in Yangshuo, featuring picturesque rural landscapes and showcasing the iconic countryside scenery of Guilin.
A lakeside park in Guilin City, with a tranquil environment suitable for morning exercises and leisurely walks.
A landmark attraction in Guilin, the mountain resembles a giant elephant drinking water with its trunk, symbolizing Guilin's natural beauty.
A commercial pedestrian street in the center of Guilin City, offering local snacks, specialties, and nightlife to experience the local culture.
